mapper.select: SELECT e.employee_id, e.login_name, e.login_pwd, e.actual_name, e.phone, e.department_id, e.disabled_flag, e.remark, e.update_time, e.create_time, d.name departmentName FROM t_role_employee er left join t_employee e on er.employee_id = e.employee_id LEFT JOIN t_department d ON e.department_id = d.department_id WHERE er.role_id = #{roleId}

SELECT e.employee_id, e.login_name, e.login_pwd, e.actual_name, e.phone, e.department_id, e.disabled_flag, e.remark, e.update_time, e.create_time, d.name departmentName FROM t_role_employee er left join t_employee e on er.employee_id = e.employee_id LEFT JOIN t_department d ON e.department_id = d.department_id WHERE er.role_id in
#{item}

SELECT employee_id FROM t_role_employee WHERE role_id in
#{item}

SELECT * FROM t_role_employee WHERE employee_id in
#{item}

SELECT re.role_id, re.employee_id, r.role_name FROM t_role_employee re LEFT JOIN t_role r ON r.role_id = re.role_id WHERE employee_id in
#{item}
